pi_items.source: Verified from setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which monitor this specific path for the final exported PNG file.
Verified from programmatic evaluation in export_result.sh which explicitly counts red pixels (R > 150, G < 80, B < 80) to confirm the annotation color change.
Verified against the task description. While programmatic validation does not strictly check exact width, it relies on red pixel volume, and 3 is the explicit prompt requirement.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetically generated CT DICOM file (PatientID: ANN001, PatientName: Annotation^Test) produced by the setup script. The evaluation script export_result.sh programmatically verifies that the final image is exported to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/publication_figure.png. Furthermore, the evaluation logic explicitly isolates and counts Red pixels (R > 150, G < 80, B < 80) to confirm the annotation color has been modified from default yellow as requested. The minimum thickness requirement of 3 matches the explicit task prompt instructions.
